# Module 7: Introduction to Machine Learning {.unnumbered}

This module bridges data wrangling and predictive modeling. You'll explore data systematically before modeling, fit your first scikit-learn model, engineer features to improve predictions, and evaluate model performance rigorously. By the end of Week 7, you'll have a complete end-to-end ML workflow and a foundation for further study in BANA 4080.

## Learning Objectives {.unnumbered}

By the end of this module, you will:

- Conduct systematic exploratory data analysis prior to modeling
- Split data into training and test sets and explain why the split matters
- Fit a baseline model using the scikit-learn API (`fit`, `predict`, `score`)
- Apply common feature engineering transformations (scaling, encoding)
- Evaluate model performance using appropriate metrics (RMSE, accuracy, AUC)
- Compare multiple models and select based on held-out performance

## Module Resources {.unnumbered}

### Lecture {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📊 Week 7 Slides | [View slides](../slides/week-07.html){target="_blank"} |
| 💻 Tuesday Your Turn Notebook | *Coming soon* |

### Chapters & Notebooks {.unnumbered}

| Chapter | Topic | Colab Notebook |
|---------|-------|---------------|
| 19 | Data Exploration | *Coming soon* |
| 20 | First Model with scikit-learn | *Coming soon* |
| 21 | Feature Engineering | *Coming soon* |
| 22 | Model Evaluation & Selection | *Coming soon* |

### Lab {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 🧪 Lab 7 | *Coming soon* |

::: {.callout-note}
## What comes next?
Module 7 is an introduction. BANA 4080 covers the full machine learning curriculum — regression, classification, tree-based models, cross-validation, hyperparameter tuning, and unsupervised learning — in depth.
:::
